description: Curate a NeurIPS-focused reading list from your Zotero library. Create a top-level collection named 'NeurIPS Preparation' containing all papers from your library published in 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems'. Tag each of these papers with 'neurips-reading'. Within the 'NeurIPS Preparation' collection, create a standalone note titled 'Presentation Outline' with a brief outline (minimum 150 characters) referencing the titles of at least two of the papers in the collection.

metadata.target_venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
target_papers: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
